notes: Works out of the box without any additional problems that don't exist on Windows. Also tested switching between desktop and game, and that also Nintendo Switch Pro controller works. The game only supports 4:3, except for cut-scenes that are widescreen. Mouse sensitivity is too high (but can be adjusted), mouse pointer is not hidden (workarounds exist) and video cut-scenes may have a scaling artifact depending on your monitors resolution. Rating platinum as the game works the same as on Windows, however the PC port to begin with is not flawless.
title: Obscure II (Obscure: The Aftermath)
